summary: Eric C. Greene's research program is anchored by affiliations with leading academic and research institutions.

items.label: Texas A&M University
items.note: Ph.D. in Biochemistry under Dorothy Shippen, establishing foundations in telomere biology.

items.label: National Institutes of Health
items.note: Postdoctoral research with Kiyoshi Mizuuchi advancing DNA recombination expertise.

items.label: Columbia University
items.note: Professor in Department of Biochemistry and Molecular Biophysics.

items.label: Herbert Irving Comprehensive Cancer Center
items.note: Member connecting DNA repair research to cancer biology.

summary: Development of novel techniques that advanced the field of single-molecule biophysics and DNA research.

items.label: DNA Curtains Technique
items.note: Pioneered high-throughput single-molecule imaging method widely adopted in the field.

items.label: Single-stranded DNA Curtains
items.note: Extended technique to single-stranded DNA, expanding experimental capabilities.

items.label: Total Internal Reflection Fluorescence Microscopy
items.note: Advanced microscopy techniques for visualizing DNA-protein interactions.

summary: High-impact publications demonstrating significant contributions to molecular biology and genome integrity research.

items.label: CRISPR-Cas9 DNA Interrogation
items.note: Highly cited publication (1100+ citations) on CRISPR mechanisms.

items.label: RAD51 Recombination Studies
items.note: Sustained research program on homologous recombination and genome stability.

items.label: DNA Repair Mechanisms
items.note: Fundamental contributions to understanding DNA repair pathways.
